description: Handoff protocol — formal contract for agent-to-agent handoff with enforcer validation

changelog.description: Initial contract: formalizes HANDOFF metadata fields, enforcer.js integration, and commit message template

STATUS.description: Task status: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, REVIEW, DONE, BLOCKED, HOTFIX

BACKEND-DEPENDENCY.description: If using mock, note the real endpoint

commitTemplate:
<type>(<scope>): <human-readable summary of what and why> (>=10 words)

HANDOFF:<next-agent-slug>
ARTIFACTS:<comma-separated-file-list>
CONTRACT:<contract-id@version>
STATUS:<STATUS>
MEMORY:<stored|not-required>
SCOPE:<project|global>
PREFLIGHT:<PASSED|NOT_REQUIRED>
[BACKEND-DEPENDENCY:<optional>]
[COST-ESTIMATE:<optional>]

enforcerIntegration.description: handoff.js calls enforcer.js handoff phase before allowing handoff
enforcerIntegration.onFailBehavior: Print block message and exit 1. Do NOT update ORCHESTRATION.md.
